prompt: 使用 $aigc-image-storyboard-frame，为 projects/aigc/示例项目/10-分组/第1集.md 的 1-1-1 分镜组生成 prompt_only 包，不生图。
expected: Loads SKILL.md and CONTEXT.md, locks the full 10-分组 group block, counts the group's 分镜N entries, binds YAML subject references when present, writes one Group 1-1-1 Multi-Image Task prompt block with non-collage prefix, and does not call imagegen.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-image-storyboard-frame，为第1集 1-2-3 分镜组调用 GPT-IMAGE-2 一次生成多张单独分镜画面，数量等于该组分镜数。
expected: Creates exactly one multi_image_task for group 1-2-3 with model gpt-image-2, call_mode gpt_image_2_multi_image_group, n equal to shot_count, reference images from YAML subject bindings, and output_mapping to images/1-2-3-N.png.

prompt: 审查 projects/aigc/示例项目/12-图像/分镜画面/第1集，检查 1-1-1 的 plan.n 和 returned_count 是否与组内分镜数一致。
expected: Runs review_only gates G1 through G9, reports FAIL-FRAME-RESULT-MAP when shot_count, plan.n, prompt Image section count, or returned_count differ, and points rework to N3-SHOT-POINT-MAP or N9-PERSIST-MAP.
